title: Ghosts Stone Floor for Hypixel Skyblock
description: Makes the glass floor in The Mist made of stone
body:
This resource pack makes the glass in the Ghost Area look like stone.
 
With this pack, visibility of the Ghosts is increased. Since stone is not transparent, you can't see through it, even when you watching through ghosts.

**[FIRMAMENT](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament) is Required**

[Check my other packs](https://modrinth.com/collection/SjHqZCax) for Hypixel Skyblock
